testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-tenancy > renders the tenant switcher and emits selected tenants from the DOM
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > provides tenancy options, browser window fallback, initializer, and interceptor providers
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > initializes tenants from query, subdomain, default resolver, and clear
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > normalizes URL and host edge cases before using the default resolver
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > prefers tenantId query values and strips ports before subdomain detection
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > passes absolute https URLs to the fallback resolver without rewriting the host
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > rejects IPv4 hosts and blank hosts before falling back to defaults
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > leaves tenant unset when no source resolves and supports manual source default
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > stores available tenants for first-load chooser surfaces
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > emits tenantChanged$ only when the tenant id changes
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > adds X-Tenant-Id from the current tenant context
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > does not override an existing tenant header
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > tenant switcher ignores empty selections and emits manual tenant changes
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > constructs the tenant switcher in an injection context
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > tenant picker renders only on multi-tenant first load and projects content after selection
@stynx-web/angular-tenancy > tenant picker accepts explicit tenant options and stays passive for single tenants or active contexts
provideTenancy SSR window provider > returns null when no browser window is available
